name: sentimentScore
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (Number.isFinite(output.result.overallScore) && output.result.overallScore >= -1 && output.result.overallScore <= 1)

output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (output.result.segmentBreakdown && output.result.segmentBreakdown.total === output.result.segmentBreakdown.positive + output.result.segmentBreakdown.negative + output.result.segmentBreakdown.neutral)

data.transcript: This is excellent and wonderful, I love it.
This is terrible and awful, I hate the failure.

_note: LENS_ACTION (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'voice.sentimentScore'. Deterministic lexicon polarity scoring with negation + intensifier handling; reads artifact.data. overallScore = (pos-neg)/(pos+neg) clamped to [-1,1] (0 when no signals — never NaN); a non-string transcript is rejected. Result card renders overallScore/overallLabel/sentimentArc/segmentBreakdown{positive,negative,neutral,total} EXACTLY — the page's prior inline panel read score/label/confidence which were never returned (fixed 2026-06-28). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTION); authored spec pinned by server/tests/voice-lens-macros.test.js.
